Name: insert_department_files_one
SQL: WITH check_nested_file AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::uuid AS "id", $2::text AS "bucket_id", $3::uuid AS "uploaded_by_user_id") AS data WHERE data."bucket_id" = ANY($4::text[])), nested_file_check_count AS (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_nested_file) >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT 0 FROM (SELECT constellation_throw_error('check constraint of an insert/update permission has failed', 'ZZ901')) x) END AS status), nested_file AS (INSERT INTO "storage"."files" ("id", "bucket_id", "uploaded_by_user_id") SELECT check_nested_file."id", check_nested_file."bucket_id", check_nested_file."uploaded_by_user_id" FROM check_nested_file WHERE (SELECT status FROM nested_file_check_count) = 1 RETURNING *), check_mutation_result AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $5::uuid AS "department_id", nested_file."id" AS "file_id" FROM nested_file) AS data WHERE data."department_id" = ANY($6::uuid[])), check_count AS (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_mutation_result) >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT 0 FROM (SELECT constellation_throw_error('check constraint of an insert/update permission has failed', 'ZZ901')) x) END AS status), mutation_result AS (INSERT INTO "public"."department_files" ("department_id", "file_id") SELECT check_mutation_result."department_id", nested_file."id" FROM check_mutation_result, nested_file WHERE (SELECT status FROM check_count) = 1 RETURNING *) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT (SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "id" AS "id", "bucket_id" AS "bucketId") AS "_e")) FROM nested_file LIMIT 1) AS "file", "mutation_result.r.department"."department" AS "department") AS "_e")) FROM mutation_result LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "mutation_result.r.department.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" WHERE "mutation_result"."department_id" = "id" AND "public"."departments"."id" = ANY($7::uuid[]) LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "mutation_result.r.department.base"."name" AS "name") AS "_e")) AS "department" FROM "mutation_result.r.department.base") AS "mutation_result.r.department" ON ('true') WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_file) IS NOT NULL
